title: What are the best Evangelion Fansubs
display_title: What are the best Evangelion Fansubs
wikitext:
[]: What are the best Evangelion Fansubs?             Quote Post by Vegeta » Tue Jan 07, 2014 9:38 pm I know a fair amount of people at this site are less than satisfied with ADV Films dubbing, and as an extension, the R1 DVD release. Whether or not you or I agree with that is not the topic for discussion here (This isn't 'Nam!). Naturally, the best alternative to a dub is a sub! My question for you all is what the best "officially accepted by the fans" translation is. I'd like to re-watch the original series, and the original Movies. I know the releases get confusing so it would be best if the subs were made to work with the latest R1 DVD release. If needed i can do basic timing and muxing to sync up the subs. Neon Genesis Evangelion TV Death and Rebirth R1 = Death(True)2 The End of Evangelion IMPORTANT: Eva, as a whole, especially the last episodes, and Death, use many frames with bold Japanese text. Obviously, I want those translated too. I tried one translation in particular of Death that did not translate these titles (Asuka Subs). I put in details just to be clear, hopefully I wasn't extremely TLDR. It seems like this would be a good thing to know for any English fan.

[]:             Quote Post by Ornette » Tue Jan 07, 2014 9:54 pm There's some discussion about this in this thread: http://forum.evageeks.org/thread/12123/Best-subtitles-for-Evangelion-TV-series/ But I dunno if there's a decidedly best set of subtitles. For the TV series, most people accept that the Platinum subtitles are best, while there's a fansub group called "Zhentarim DivX" (prefix is "zx") that seems to be ok.

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Sat Jan 11, 2014 12:28 am I like A2000A's work on Renewal (TV Series, Death, EoE) but for the TV series, ADV's job on Platinum is good.
